title: satureja forbesii var. inodora
intro: Satureja forbesii var. inodora, also known as mountain savory, is a variety of the satureja plant species native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This perennial herb has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Satureja forbesii var. inodora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, mountain savory can be consumed as a tea, used in cooking, or applied topically as a salve, allowing for its various health benefits to be harnessed.
